items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the behavior of rate limiting on authentication endpoints, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The expected result mentions confirming the scenario behavior or producing a failure report, yet the evidence does not include any specific tests or outcomes related to rate limiting. Therefore, the lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this scenario.
